title: Shared Clarification Request Schema Validation
description: Validates the standalone clarification-request.schema.json as a reusable contract fragment for NEEDS_INPUT payloads

inputs.label: valid-clarification-request
inputs.description: A well-formed clarification request with 2 options, impact analysis, and recommendation

options.description: Use inline styles for the component
Use CSS modules for the component

input.impact_analysis: This decision affects the styling architecture for all future components in the project.
input.recommended_option_rationale: CSS modules provide better long-term maintainability and theme support with minimal build config overhead.

inputs.label: invalid-single-option
inputs.description: A clarification request with only 1 option should fail validation (minItems: 2)
inputs.expected_failure_reason: options array has fewer than 2 items

inputs.label: invalid-missing-impact
inputs.description: A clarification request missing impact_analysis should fail validation

inputs.label: invalid-four-options
inputs.description: A clarification request with 4 options should fail validation (maxItems: 3)
inputs.expected_failure_reason: options array has more than 3 items

assertions: Valid clarification requests pass schema validation against schemas/clarification-request.schema.json
Each option must have id and description
impact_analysis, recommended_option, and recommended_option_rationale are all required
Schema is self-contained and can be referenced via $ref from execution report schemas
Oracle and Scout schemas are intentionally excluded from clarification_request adoption (read-only agents without NEEDS_INPUT status)
